# Name: # esp-radio OTA partition table (4 MiB flash
#   - `nvs`     reserved for future Wi-Fi / system NVS use; the radio's
#               existing credential store actually lives in the *last* sector
#               that offset inside `storage` means existing devices keep
#               their saved Wi-Fi config across the partition-table change.
#   - `otadata` two-sector slot the bootloader uses to track which
#               app slot to boot (and rollback bookkeeping).
#   - `ota_0`   primary app slot at 0x20000 — same offset espflash uses for
#   - `ota_1`   secondary app slot. ~1.875 MiB each; current release build
#               is ~1.1 MiB so we have ~750 KiB headroom for growth.
#   - `storage` 128 KiB region used by the radio for both presets
# When updating: bump the offsets coherently and then re-flash the
# bootloader + partition table + ota_0 in one go to avoid stale otadata.
